summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iteration 4 features: Admin user edit with Italian business fields, bidirectional messaging system. All 17 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including admin user edit form, messaging tab, and client messages panel.
critical_code_review_comments: User model properly extended with Italian business fields (phone, client_type, company_name, vat_number, sdi_code, pec, website, notes, purchase_history)
Messaging system uses conversation_id pattern 'conv_{USER1ID[:8]}_{USER2ID[:8]}' (sorted) for bidirectional tracking
Email notifications sent via threading.Thread to avoid blocking API responses - may fail silently if SMTP credentials are invalid
Client messages panel slides in from right side - smooth animation
Task messages have task_completed field and can be marked as completed via dedicated endpoint
Admin user table shows 'Tipo' column with Private/Business/Foreign client types
Business fields section only appears when client_type is 'business' or 'foreign'
seed_data_creation: Test users and messages created and cleaned up during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Messaging system fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET/POST /api/admin/messages, GET/POST /api/members/messages, GET /api/members/messages/unread-count, POST /api/members/messages/{id}/complete-task. User update endpoint PUT /api/admin/users/{id} supports all new Italian business fields. Email notifications sent via Zoho SMTP (smtp.zoho.eu:587) in background thread.

features_verified: PUT /api/admin/users/{id} updates all new Italian business fields (phone, client_type, company_name, vat_number, sdi_code, pec, website, notes, purchase_history)
Admin user edit form shows all fields: personal (name, email, phone, DOB), address, fiscal code, client type selector
Business fields (Ragione Sociale, P.IVA/VAT, Codice Univoco SDI, PEC, Website) appear when business/foreign client type selected
Admin messaging tab shows conversation list sidebar and chat area
Admin can send text, audio, video, and task messages to clients
Task messages include description and due date fields
POST /api/admin/messages creates message and returns it with all fields
POST /api/members/messages creates client reply to admin
Client sees messages button with unread count badge in header
Client messages panel slides in from right side
Client can view admin messages and reply
